name: KUROI CHOCHO BUNSHIN NO TATE (BLACK BUTTERFLY REPLICATION SHIELD)

description.value:
The user commands a Kuroi Chocho Bunshin or Tajuu Kuroi Chocho Bunshin to step in and intercept a melee or ranged attack.

Requires: Kuroi Chocho Bunshin no Jutsu (t)

Defensive Maneuver: : This technique can only be used when the user or an ally is attacked or otherwise threatened, and must be declared before the opponent makes his attack roll. To properly execute this technique, the Kuroi Chocho Bunshin must be within 20 feet from the location where the attack will hit, if a melee attack, or within 20 feet of the path a ranged attack will come from. The perform DC for this technique is equal to the opponent's attack roll (minimum 19). Skill threshold does not apply to defensive maneuvers. If the technique is successful, the target of the attack will take no damage from the technique while the replicate itself takes full damage.

Each use of a defensive maneuver stacks with all other techniques with a similar effect.

Mastery: Every step of mastery after the first allows the technique to be used an additional time per day, up to 5/day.

With the fifth step of mastery in this technique, the user is able to create a replicate as part of performing this technique when being attacked and does not require a nearby Kuroi Chocho Bunshin. Doing so deals 1d4 points of non-lethal damage to the user and requires the user pay the additional chakra cost as per Kuroi Chocho Bunshin no Jutsu.
